arguments.argument:
event_inherited() setCollisionBounds(-4,-4,4,4) bCanDealDamage=false image_speed=0.5
damageType="EXPLOSION" weaponTag=21 atkLv=global.stJGame_B[0] atkPower=20+global.stJGame_B[0] atkPower=weaponDmgMod(0,atkPower) global.recAtkNum+=1 stunTime=1 bCanHitSwitch=0
xVel=random_range(-2,2) yVel=-6.5-random(3) timeTillDamage=0
